title: AI Agent Assigned Profile Map
riido_task: RIID-4720 [Contracts] AI Agent assigned profile map
summary: Workspace task/card assigned-agent profile hints are generated from API policy, schema, DSL, IR, and OpenAPI fixtures.
required_policy_rules: server: include only currently active queued/running/stopping AI Agent assignments in the workspace map
server: omit completed, stopped, failed, unassigned, and historical-only task threads from the map
server: use the actual Riido component_id/task_id string as the map key without renaming it to a literal component_id field
server: because a task/subtask can have only one active AI Agent assignment, each component_id maps to one AssignedAgentProfile value
profile: avatar_url is copied from the assigned agent's profile_thumbnail_url when present
profile: tmp_color is the fixture-provided avatar fallback color copied into fixture-created agents; direct-created agents may omit it
client: use this query for list/card avatar hints, not for participant dropdown candidate selection or task-thread history
invariants: assigned_agent_profiles is keyed by the exact component_id/task_id string.
only queued/running/stopping AI Agent assignments appear in the map.
completed, stopped, failed, unassigned, and historical-only threads are omitted.
the query is for list/card avatar hints, not participant dropdown candidates or task-thread history.

loop.observation: Workspace assigned-agent profile map meaning was split across policy prose and API projection prose while DSL policy, schemas, scenarios, and OpenAPI already defined the read model.
loop.hypothesis: A focused verifier can make assigned-profile-map drift observable and keep task/card avatar hints separate from participant dropdown and thread history APIs.
loop.execute: Verify the v2 query operation, generated path, response schemas, read-model policy rules, DSL/IR tuple parity, OpenAPI projection, and active-only map semantics.
loop.evaluate: CI fails when map key semantics, active-only filtering rules, schema fields, generated reader, or v2 OpenAPI projection drift.
loop.retrospective: Future assigned-profile list/card semantics should update API policy/schema fixtures and this manifest before reader text changes.
